_comment: CYBERDUDEBIVASH® SENTINEL APEX — Cloudflare WAF Custom Rules
_deploy: Apply via Cloudflare Dashboard → Security → WAF → Custom Rules, or Terraform cloudflare_ruleset resource

ruleset.name: CDB SENTINEL APEX WAF Ruleset
ruleset.description: Production WAF rules for SENTINEL APEX API

rules.description: Block direct access to /metrics endpoint from non-internal IPs
Block known malicious bot user agents
rules.comment: Block scanner signatures targeting FastAPI/Python stacks
rules.expression: (http.user_agent contains "sqlmap") or (http.user_agent contains "Nikto") or (http.user_agent contains "Acunetix") or (http.user_agent contains "Nessus") or (http.user_agent contains "masscan") or (http.user_agent contains "zgrab") or (http.user_agent contains "python-requests/2." and http.request.uri.path contains "/admin") or (http.user_agent eq "")

rules.description: Block SQL injection patterns in query strings
rules.comment: OWASP CRS SQLi patterns adapted for Cloudflare expression language
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.query contains "UNION SELECT") or (http.request.uri.query contains "OR 1=1") or (http.request.uri.query contains "DROP TABLE") or (http.request.uri.query contains "'; --") or (http.request.uri.query contains "xp_cmdshell")
(http.request.uri.path contains "../") or (http.request.uri.path contains "..%2F") or (http.request.uri.path contains "..%5C") or (http.request.uri.path contains "%2e%2e%2f")

rules.description: Rate limit unauthenticated requests to public Intel API
rules.comment: Sliding window — complement to application-layer rate limiter

rules.description: Block requests to sensitive admin paths from non-allowlisted IPs
rules.comment: Set CDB_ADMIN_IP_ALLOWLIST in Cloudflare WAF IP list
rules._note: Enable after populating the cdb_admin_allowlist IP list in Cloudflare dashboard

rules.description: Challenge requests with suspicious header combinations
rules.expression: not http.request.headers["accept"] exists and not http.request.headers["user-agent"] contains "Go-http-client" and http.request.uri.path starts_with "/api/v1"

rules.description: Block oversized request bodies (potential DoS / payload injection)
rules.comment: 4MB max for API, 50MB for STIX bundle uploads

rules.description: Enforce HTTPS-only — redirect HTTP to HTTPS

rules.comment: Adjust ip.geoip.country list based on your legal jurisdiction requirements
rules._note: Review legal/compliance requirements before enabling. Disabled by default.

recommendations.comment: OWASP Core Rule Set — catch broad attack patterns
Paranoia level 2 = balanced detection vs. false positives
Block logins with credentials found in public breach databases

rules.comment: Health check — no cache, no challenge
Public intel feed — cache 5 minutes at edge to reduce origin load

bot_management.comment: Enable Bot Fight Mode only after baseline testing to avoid blocking legitimate clients

http_ddos_attack_protection.comment: Increase to high if under active DDoS. Medium avoids false positives.
